entry.title: Hello, World
entry.summary: First post. Not much to say yet — I'm still figuring out what this place is going to be.
entry.content:
First post. Not much to say yet — I'm still figuring out what this place is going to be.

The plan is to write about things I find interesting as I come across them. No specific topic, no schedule, just stuff worth putting into words.

If you're reading this somehow: hi.
